title: macrocarpaea noctiluca
intro: Macrocarpaea noctiluca, also known as the night-blooming Macrocarpaea, is a flowering plant species native to the Andes mountains in South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The leaves and flowers of Macrocarpaea noctiluca can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions for herbal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
